_meta.description: Ceiling exhaust, round neck. Identical sizing methodology to RG-1 (ceiling return, RJA - Return Grate - Rectangular - Round Neck) -- same family shape (Types 12x12/18x18/24x24, Flow/Duct Diameter/Duct Radius/Diffuser Width/Height parameter structure), confirmed via live parameter inspection before building.
_meta.why_identical_to_RG-1: RG-1 abandoned NC-based sizing entirely in favor of pure 600 FPM velocity sizing (area x 600fpm), which is just geometry -- it doesn't depend on face size, application (return vs exhaust), or any cutsheet-specific NC data. See RG-1_perforated_ceiling_return.json for the full derivation/rationale; this file just documents that EG-1 reuses the identical breakpoints and per-Type diameter ceilings.
_meta.family_parameters: Flow (instance), Duct Diameter (instance, formula below), Duct Radius (instance, pre-existing formula Duct Diameter/2, untouched), Diffuser Width/Height (TYPE, discriminator), Sizing Warning (instance, Text, added this build), Line length and Total Pressure (instance, pre-existing, untouched, unrelated to sizing).
_meta.verified: 11 boundary test cases (regenerate-and-read) across all 3 Types and all breakpoints/ceilings, all pass -- 2026-07-24.

sizing_warning_formula: IF(Diffuser Width < 15", IF(Flow > 327, "OVER CAPACITY - MAX 327 CFM FOR 12X12 (10 IN MAX NECK)", ""), IF(Diffuser Width < 21", IF(Flow > 838, "OVER CAPACITY - MAX 838 CFM FOR 18X18 (16 IN MAX NECK)", ""), IF(Flow > 1584, "OVER CAPACITY - MAX 1584 CFM FOR 24X24 (22 IN MAX NECK)", "")))
